description: The audit bundle export and offline verification contract. regista exports a self-contained JSON bundle with events, receipts, segments, and public keys; agent-provenance exports cairn bundles. The suite-level export orchestration is not yet implemented (Plan 009 WI-2.3).

envelope_descriptions.1: HMAC envelope — canonical_envelope is HMAC-SHA256 over the event hash; signature is HMAC
envelope_descriptions.2: Ed25519 envelope — canonical_envelope is Ed25519 signature over the event hash; signature is Ed25519

verification_checks: format — bundle is valid JSON with required sections
signatures — each event's signature verifies against the declared key
entity_chain — per-work-item event chain integrity (prev_event_hash, event_seq)
gaps — missing event_seq or global_seq detected
bundle_linkage — cairn bundles link to regista events via correlation IDs
invariants: Export requires no production credentials — only public keys are included
v1 envelopes report 'skipped' for Ed25519 verification (honestly, not falsely)
v2 envelopes verify Ed25519 signatures against public_keys section
A stale-session or tamper decoy must fail verification
Anchor mismatch is detected by verify_anchor_receipt, not by replay
